23.reason: [When the stack is empty, pop() prints "error " but still returns an undefined value which is then printed as "%d ", leading to incorrect output format and potential undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [When the stack is empty, pop() prints "error " but still returns an undefined value which is then printed as "%d ", leading to incorrect output format and potential undefined behavior.]

39.reason: [This prints "error " but the function is expected to return an integer. In the main loop, the return value is always printed with "%d ", so when the stack is empty, both "error " and an undefined/garbage integer will be printed, violating the required output format.]
